response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience and meets the baseline qualifications (BS CS, 8+ years, relevant languages, some high-throughput production work at Sociomantic). However, the role is Principal/IC6 focused specifically on experimentation platforms, telemetry, feature flighting, and statistical/measurement systems — and the resume shows no demonstrated experience building or operating experimentation frameworks, A/B testing infrastructure, metrics platforms, or rollout-risk systems. Current title is Senior/Staff rather than Principal, and there is no evidence of multi-team platform ownership at enterprise scale. Strong generalist, but a poor domain fit for this specialized Principal role.
strengths: 13+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Exposure to high-throughput systems (millions of HTTP req/s at Sociomantic) and modern AI/agent tooling (MCP)
Strong TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship background with teaching/workshop experience indicating mentorship capability
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, or measurement platform experience — the core of this role
Lacks evidence of Principal/IC6-level scope: no multi-team platform ownership, architectural leadership across orgs, or systemic rollout/guardrail work
Limited statistical/data-science depth and no track record with telemetry foundations or feature-flighting systems at enterprise scale
